events.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6 Released
events.description: Anthropic releases Claude Sonnet 4.6, a faster and more affordable model in the 4.6 family with strong coding and reasoning performance.

events.title: Claude Opus 4.6 Released
events.description: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.6 with extended thinking and a 1M context window option, setting new benchmarks across reasoning tasks.

events.title: Gemini 2.5 Pro Released
events.description: Google launches Gemini 2.5 Pro with a native 1M token context window and improved multimodal reasoning capabilities.

events.title: Llama 4 Scout & Maverick Released
events.description: Meta releases Llama 4 with Scout (10M context) and Maverick (1M context) variants, pushing open-source model capabilities forward.

events.title: GPT-4.5 Released
events.description: OpenAI launches GPT-4.5 with a 256K context window and significantly improved creative writing and emotional intelligence.

events.title: Grok 3 Released
events.description: xAI releases Grok 3 with strong reasoning performance, trained on the Colossus 200K GPU cluster.

events.title: DeepSeek V3 Released
events.description: DeepSeek releases V3, a powerful open-source model trained with a fraction of the compute used by competitors, sparking industry debate about efficiency.

events.title: Claude 3.5 Haiku Released
events.description: Anthropic releases Claude 3.5 Haiku, a fast and affordable model that outperforms the original Claude 3 Opus on many benchmarks.

events.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet v2 Released
events.description: Anthropic ships an upgraded Claude 3.5 Sonnet with computer use capabilities and significant improvements in coding and tool use.

events.title: EU AI Act Enforcement Begins
events.description: The European Union begins enforcing the AI Act, requiring risk assessments and transparency for high-risk AI systems deployed in EU markets.

events.title: OpenAI o1 Released
events.description: OpenAI launches o1, a reasoning-focused model that uses chain-of-thought at inference time to solve complex math and coding problems.

events.title: Llama 3.1 405B Released
events.description: Meta releases Llama 3.1 with a 405B parameter variant, the largest open-source model at the time, matching frontier closed models.

events.title: GPT-4o Mini Released
events.description: OpenAI launches GPT-4o Mini at $0.15 per million input tokens, dramatically undercutting existing pricing and pressuring the entire market.

events.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet Released
events.description: Anthropic releases Claude 3.5 Sonnet, surpassing GPT-4o on most benchmarks while maintaining fast response times and lower costs.

events.title: GPT-4o Released
events.description: OpenAI releases GPT-4o with native multimodal capabilities including real-time voice and vision, available free to all ChatGPT users.

events.title: Llama 3 Released
events.description: Meta releases Llama 3 in 8B and 70B variants, establishing a new bar for open-source language model performance.

events.title: Claude 3 Family Released
events.description: Anthropic launches the Claude 3 model family (Haiku, Sonnet, Opus) with vision capabilities and a 200K context window.

events.title: Gemini 1.5 Pro Released
events.description: Google launches Gemini 1.5 Pro with a 1M token context window, a major leap in long-context processing for production use.

events.title: Gemini 2.0 Flash Released
events.description: Google releases Gemini 2.0 Flash with native tool use and multimodal output, optimized for agentic workflows.

events.title: Mistral Large 2 Released
events.description: Mistral releases Large 2 with a 256K context window, strong multilingual support, and competitive pricing for enterprise use.

events.title: OpenAI Valued at $157B
events.description: OpenAI closes a $6.6B funding round at a $157B valuation, making it the most valuable private AI company in the world.

events.title: EU AI Act Enters Into Force
events.description: The EU AI Act officially enters into force, establishing the world's first comprehensive legal framework for artificial intelligence regulation.

events.title: Anthropic Raises $2.75B from Amazon
events.description: Amazon completes its $2.75B additional investment in Anthropic, bringing its total commitment to $4B and deepening the AWS partnership.
